items.evidence: Goal scope is FE-only (grid-core hook + component). No Spring Boot backend involvement — tvcom_back gradlew compileJava not applicable. Per rubric A-01 'N/A: 그리드 작업이 FE 전용일 때 (대부분 N/A)'.

(1) `npx tsc --noEmit` in D:/project/topvel_project/topvel-grid-monorepo/packages/grid-core → EXIT_CODE=0 (0 errors). (2) `npx tsc --noEmit` in D:/project/topvel_project/TOMIS/tw-framework-front → EXIT_CODE=0 (0 errors, no output). Both grid-core package + downstream consumer tw-framework-front compile clean post-hotfix (ColumnVisibilityMenu.tsx L27-39 props interface + L64-69 destructure + L77/L86/L109 render usage).

`npx tsup` in grid-core → EXIT_CODE=0. Build artifacts: dist/index.cjs=60.38 KB raw / dist/index.mjs=58.85 KB raw, dist/legacy/index.{cjs,mjs}=43.56/42.47 KB raw, DTS bundles 26.15 KB. gzip measurement (gzip -c via Git/usr/bin): dist/index.mjs raw=60,812 / gzip=13,411 bytes (≈13.1 KB), dist/index.cjs raw=62,374 / gzip=13,535 bytes. C-21 grid-core ≤ 30 KB hard limit satisfied with ≈55% headroom. .size-limit.json not configured at grid-core (pre-existing infra gap, not introduced by G-003 — flagged in feedback). Goal title 'useColumnPersistence + ColumnVisibilityMenu — 컬럼 가시성·순서 영속화' contains no 'build/tsup/tsc/vite/rollup/size-limit/bundle' keyword (no vacuous-block trigger applicable to A — but A is not vacuous: 2 YES + 1 N/A with denominator 2). tsup build success constitutes the operative bundle verification gate.

Goal scope = column visibility + order persistence (useColumnPersistence + ColumnVisibilityMenu). Sorting state untouched — useColumnPersistence.ts L128-134 writes only `visibility` + `order` to localStorage; restore path L111-115 calls only setColumnVisibility/setColumnOrder, never touches sorting. No regression vector for sort.
Filter behavior unchanged — Goal does not touch column filters. ColumnVisibilityMenu.tsx L70-74 uses `col.getCanHide()` which is hide-eligibility, not column-filter feature.
Pagination behavior unchanged — Goal does not touch pagination. Grid.tsx L80-83 pagination state untouched; buildTableOptions paginationActive logic unchanged by G-003.

Virtualization compatibility verified by Read of Grid.tsx: columnVisibility (L101) + columnOrder (L102) state additions flow through buildTableOptions (L119-122) into useReactTable (L125-129). The virtualization padding-row pattern (L226-244) uses `table.getAllLeafColumns()` (L245) and `table.getRowModel()` rows — both honor TanStack's columnVisibility/columnOrder state automatically. useColumnPersistence (useColumnPersistence.ts L87-149) only reads/writes localStorage + calls `table.setColumnVisibility`/`table.setColumnOrder`; no DOM reads, no position:absolute cells, no scroll-element coupling. C-18 / C-10 compatible. Storybook stories (ColumnVisibilityMenu.stories.tsx L76-128) use the standard `<Grid>` integration path.
Inline editing out of Goal scope (handled by MOD-GRID-05 / MOD-GRID-10). G-003 deals only with column visibility/order persistence.

`affectedUsageFiles: []` per goals.json L208 + spec Section 8.0 explicit '영향 사용처: 0개'. Goal is purely additive — new optional prop `columnPersistence?: ColumnPersistenceOptions` on GridProps + new files. Verified by `npx tsc --noEmit` in D:/project/topvel_project/TOMIS/tw-framework-front → EXIT_CODE=0 (0 errors, no output). No downstream consumer breakage. Pre-existing DataTable usages remain untouched (migration scheduled at MOD-GRID-17 per spec deprecationStrategy).

Visual regression: affectedUsageFiles=[] → no AS-IS consumer UI being replaced in this Goal. data-table-view-options.tsx remains untouched (Section 1.1 — direct migration source preserved). The new ColumnVisibilityMenu (ColumnVisibilityMenu.tsx L64-142) is additive and only renders when `columnPersistence` prop provided (Grid.tsx L249-253). 4 Storybook stories authored as the visual spec for the additive component (Default/VisibilityOnly/NoOp/NoPersistence — stories.tsx L76-128). No pre-existing visual baseline to regress against. C-17 N/A condition: '영향 사용처 0개'.

Grep `console\.(warn|error|log)` on useColumnPersistence.ts + ColumnVisibilityMenu.tsx → 0 hits in G-003 NEW files. localStorage failure paths use silent try/catch (useColumnPersistence.ts L50-53 readStorage catch, L61-63 writeStorage catch — NFR-002 + EC-003 silent skip per spec). Grid.tsx retains pre-existing virtualization + multiSort dev-warn (L181-184, L197-200) — unrelated to G-003 scope, both gated by NODE_ENV !== 'production'. No PropTypes use (strict TS throughout). No new React warnings introduced (forwardRef + useImperativeHandle pattern unchanged from G-004).

affectedUsageFiles=[] → no usage migration in this Goal (additive new prop + new files). Migration ratio undefined (0/0). spec Section 8.0 explicitly notes G-003 does not migrate any existing usage; DataTable usage migration is deferred to MOD-GRID-17 per spec deprecationStrategy 'DataTableViewOptions alias 1 minor 버전 유지'.

No remaining usages — 0 usage migrations in this Goal. spec Section 10 documents deferred migration path (DataTable→Grid with columnPersistence) for actual transition at MOD-GRID-17. findings/documented-deviations/ entry not required (no jobs left over).

Gzip measurement of built artifacts (gzip -c via Git/usr/bin): dist/index.mjs raw=60,812 bytes / gzip=13,411 bytes (≈13.1 KB); dist/index.cjs raw=62,374 / gzip=13,535. C-21 grid-core ≤ 30 KB hard limit satisfied with ≈55% headroom. spec Section 8.5 bundleImpact.expected = '+3 KB' (NFR-001). Prior verify-score recorded 11,755 bytes gzip for mjs; current delta ≈ +1,656 bytes ≈ +1.6 KB which is within the +3 KB target. No bundle limit violation.

Zero new dependencies / peerDependencies added by G-003. spec D3 explicit decision: '신규 peerDep 없음 — Radix UI / react-icons 미추가, 네이티브 HTML <details>/<summary>/<input> + Tailwind only'. package.json L31-36 peerDependencies unchanged: react / react-dom / @tanstack/react-table / @tanstack/react-virtual — all pre-existing from prior Goals (MOD-GRID-01~02 + G-001/G-002). No ADR required (C-20 trigger absent).

package.json L5 `"license": "MIT"` present (C-24 disclosure satisfied). License field is the package-manifest gate. Note: LICENSE/EULA file is absent at package root and monorepo root — pre-existing monorepo-wide concern not introduced by G-003 (consistent with G-001/G-002 baseline state). Not blocking for this Goal; recommend monorepo-level LICENSE addition outside G-003 scope. Pro-tier license verification N/A (grid-core is MIT).

feedback: Hotfix verified: ColumnVisibilityMenu.tsx L27-39 ColumnVisibilityMenuProps now includes triggerLabel/menuLabel/className optional props as spec Section 8.3 + Section 10 require. L64-69 destructure with defaults ('리스트 항목 설정' / '표시할 항목 선택'). L77 className interpolated into root <details>. L86 triggerLabel rendered in <summary>. L109 menuLabel rendered as menu header. Spec drift from prior implement-score (A-03 NO) fully resolved.

Bundle delta tracking: gzip mjs 11,755 → 13,411 bytes (+1,656 ≈ +1.6 KB) — within spec Section 8.5 +3 KB target. Recommend adding .size-limit.json + script to grid-core/package.json for delta-based automated verification in future Goals (carry-over from G-001/G-002 verify-score; not blocking for this Goal).
Monorepo LICENSE files absent (pre-existing). Recommend adding LICENSE (MIT) at monorepo root + grid-core package directory before public npm publish. Out of G-003 scope.

Storybook stories (4 variants: Default/VisibilityOnly/NoOp/NoPersistence) provide the visual spec but Chromatic/Playwright screenshot automation not wired. Manual visual review of stories recommended once Storybook is running in CI. ColumnVisibilityMenu.stories.tsx imports `{ Grid }` from '../Grid' and `{ createColumns }` from './createColumns' — render path validated by tsup build success.

vitest not installed at monorepo level — useColumnPersistence.test.ts + ColumnVisibilityMenu.test.tsx authored per spec Section 6 TC-001~TC-008 but not runtime-executed. Implement-rubric A-07 N/A justification (v1.0.9 environment-defect rule). Recommend cascading vitest installation Goal at MOD-GRID-00 infra track (3rd occurrence per implement-score documentedDeviations).
